289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

402.issue_title: tooling: Expose JSON data in MCP tools

cycles.name: Cycle 1: Core Presenter & Infrastructure

deliverables.description: Base output schemas in tool_outputs.py and global presentation.yaml config

TextPresenter implementation and validate_presentation_alignment drift validator, verifying that YAML anchors and aliases are resolved safely and that the validator gracefully ignores tools without an output_model during the migration phase
assert_structured_tool_result pytest helper
Update StructuredTool.execute() dispatcher and signature to support BaseModel | tuple return types
Add presentation_config: PresentationConfig to ConfigLayer in bootstrap.py and implement parsing in ConfigLoader
Extend MCPServer.__init__ and ServerBootstrapper to inject TextPresenter, and update MCPServer.handle_call_tool() routing to support both BaseModel DTO (presenter-formatted) and legacy tuple outputs
Infrastructure test suite refactor: update all test instantiations of MCPServer and mock configs to support PresentationConfig and TextPresenter constructor-injection
Define presentation_category: ClassVar[str | None] = None on BaseTool (or StructuredTool) to resolve the emoji-mapping conflict with tool_category

cycles.exit_criteria: TextPresenter, server injection, config loader, and startup validator pass all unit tests.

cycles.name: Cycle 2: Batch 1 (Admin, Health & Cycle Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of HealthCheckTool, RestartServerTool, TransitionCycleTool, and ForceCycleTransitionTool

cycles.exit_criteria: All Batch 1 tools return Pydantic DTOs and compact text fallbacks, verified by assert_structured_tool_result.

cycles.name: Cycle 3: Batch 2 (Discovery & Project Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Discovery, Search, and Project tools (Batch 2)

cycles.exit_criteria: All Discovery & Project tools return Pydantic DTOs and match templates in presentation.yaml.

cycles.name: Cycle 4: Batch 3a (Git Analysis & Info Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Git status, list, diff, parent, and merge check tools

cycles.exit_criteria: Git status, list, diff, parent, and merge check tools migrated and return DTOs.

cycles.name: Cycle 5: Batch 3b (Git Mutation & Action Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Git branch creation, commit, restore, checkout, push, merge, delete, stash, fetch, and pull tools

cycles.exit_criteria: Git branch creation, commit, restore, checkout, push, merge, delete, stash, fetch, and pull tools migrated.

cycles.name: Cycle 6: Batch 4a (GitHub Issues & PRs)

deliverables.description: Move read models to github_models.py and migrate Issue and PR tools
Check that nested read models validation in IssueOutput and PROutput does not trigger extra fields errors or serialization mismatch under frozen=True

cycles.exit_criteria: GitHub Issues and PR tools successfully migrated and return flattened DTO presentation fields.

cycles.name: Cycle 7: Batch 4b (GitHub Labels & Milestones)

deliverables.description: Migration of GitHub Label and Milestone tools

cycles.exit_criteria: GitHub Labels and Milestones tools successfully migrated and return flattened DTO presentation fields.

cycles.name: Cycle 8: Auto-Fix Tool & MCP Resource Pilot

deliverables.description: Implement AutoFixTool (with AutoFixInput and AutoFixOutput DTOs) and QAManager.run_auto_fix()
Extend ExecutionConfig schema in quality_config.py to support optional fix_command
Update the startup configuration loader/validator to fail-fast if any quality gate has supports_autofix: true but lacks fix_command
Implement IToolResponseCache interface and ResponseCacheManager with FIFO eviction (OrderedDict) and store Pydantic DTO instances directly in memory

Implement CachedResponseResource (inheriting from BaseResource) matching uniform pattern pgmcp://cache/runs/.*, register it in bootstrap.py's _build_resources(), and inject the cache manager into the server and resource constructor
Add declarative presentation template and advisory mapping for auto_fix in presentation.yaml, returning the lightweight summary referencing the uniform resource URI

cycles.exit_criteria: AutoFixTool runs and modifies files correctly; startup validator correctly raises ConfigError for misconfigured auto-fixes; response cache evicts oldest runs correctly; and the model can successfully retrieve the run's JSON data using the read_resource tool from the uniform cache resource.

cycles.name: Cycle 9: Batch 5 (Phase, Scaffold, Quality & Testing Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of transition, scaffold, quality, pytest, and safe edit tools, ensuring strict separation of details
Remove transition constants and discard logic from phase_tools.py and server.py, resolving the double-SSOT advisory issue

cycles.exit_criteria: Batch 9 tools migrated; pytest tracebacks and safe edit diffs are only returned in the JSON payload, and JSON reference is appended conditionally.

cycles.name: Cycle 10: Validation, Quality Gates, and Cleanup

deliverables.description: Green full test suite run and clean quality gates check
Remove the compatibility bridge in StructuredTool so it only supports BaseModel DTOs, satisfying YAGNI §9

cycles.exit_criteria: All 2880+ tests pass, and quality gates pass with zero lint or typing violations. Compatibility bridge removed cleanly.
